title: Between Life & Death: Terri Schiavo's Story
original_title: Between Life & Death: Terri Schiavo's Story
overview: Revisits the story of Terri Schiavo, a deeply personal decade-long saga that captivated the country and forced Americans to reckon with profound issues at the intersection of faith and politics that reverberate to this day.
